comments.body:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/agents/red-test-evaluator.md` — the dso:red-test-evaluator plugin agent definition.

YAML frontmatter:
- name: red-test-evaluator
- model: opus
- description: Triages RED test writer failures with REVISE/REJECT/CONFIRM verdicts.
- tools: [Bash, Read, Glob, Grep]

Prompt sections:
1. Role and Identity — opus-tier triage agent for RED test failures
2. Input Contract — parses TEST_RESULT:rejected from red-test-writer (per red-test-writer-output.md contract)
3. Verdict Decision Logic — REVISE/REJECT/CONFIRM routing criteria
4. REVISE Output — impact_assessment covering both in-progress and closed tasks, affected_tasks, revision_guidance
5. REJECT Output — rejection_reason, recommended_model=opus
6. CONFIRM Output — infeasibility_category (infrastructure | injection | documentation | reference_removal), justification
7. Output Contract — structured JSON schema for all 3 verdicts

After creating the agent, also:
- Remove the RED marker from .test-index: change `[test_frontmatter_has_name_red_test_evaluator]` to no marker
- Verify all RED tests pass (GREEN)
- Set executable bit on test file if not already set

## File Impact
- CREATE: plugins/dso/agents/red-test-evaluator.md
- MODIFY: .test-index (remove RED marker)

## TDD Requirement
Depends on Task c15c-7989 (RED). After creating this file, RED tests must pass (GREEN).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Agent file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/red-test-evaluator.md
- [ ] name=red-test-evaluator
  Verify: head -10 $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/red-test-evaluator.md | grep -q 'name: red-test-evaluator'
- [ ] model=opus
  Verify: head -10 $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/red-test-evaluator.md | grep -q 'model: opus'
- [ ] Contains infeasibility categories
  Verify: grep -q 'infrastructure' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/red-test-evaluator.md && grep -q 'reference_removal' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/red-test-evaluator.md
- [ ] All RED tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/agents/test-red-test-evaluator.sh
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: grep 'red-test-evaluator.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -v '\['
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Integration into sprint/fix-bug orchestrators is explicitly OUT OF SCOPE for this story — handled by Stories 12ff-5043 and 79a6-2094. Do NOT attempt to wire the agent into any orchestrator skill during this task. The agent file exists as a standalone definition ready for dispatch by later stories.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
